'''''Bonderium''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] used by rebel agents to intercept the Imperial transport [[Elusive (transport)|''Elusive'']] on its way from the planetary ruin of [[Dankayo/Legends|Dankayo]] to the [[Tolan Navy Yards]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|''Scavenger Hunt'']]
